name: Vintage Wooden Chair
description: A beautiful solid oak chair from the 1960s, in excellent condition. Minor scratches on the legs but otherwise pristine.

name: Mountain Bike
description: Trek mountain bike, 21-speed, barely used. Great for trails and city commuting. Includes helmet and lock.

name: Kitchen Aid Stand Mixer
description: KitchenAid Professional 5-qt stand mixer in red. Works perfectly, all attachments included. Selling because upgrading.

name: Canon DSLR Camera
description: Canon EOS Rebel T7i with 18-55mm lens. Excellent image quality, 24.2MP sensor. Perfect for beginners and enthusiasts.

name: Acoustic Guitar
description: Yamaha F310 acoustic guitar with case and extra strings. Great beginner guitar in perfect playing condition.

name: Leather Sofa
description: Brown genuine leather 3-seater sofa. Very comfortable with no rips or tears. Minor fading on armrests.

name: iPad Pro 11-inch
description: Apple iPad Pro 11-inch (3rd generation), 128GB, Space Gray. Includes Apple Pencil and Smart Keyboard Folio.

name: Yoga Mat and Blocks
description: Lululemon The Mat 5mm yoga mat plus two cork blocks and a strap. Used only 10 times. Excellent condition.

name: Coffee Table
description: Mid-century modern walnut coffee table, 47 inches long. Great condition, just a few minor scratches.

name: Blender Pro
description: Vitamix E310 Explorian blender with 10 variable speeds. Includes container and tamper. Makes incredible smoothies.

name: Children's Bicycle
description: 20-inch kids bike with training wheels and basket. Pink and white. Good condition with some rust on one wheel.

name: Sony PlayStation 5
description: PS5 Disc Edition with two controllers, charging dock, and 5 games. Everything works perfectly.

name: Sewing Machine
description: Brother CS6000i Computerized Sewing Machine with 60 built-in stitches. Perfect for beginners and advanced sewers.

name: Bookshelf 5-Shelf
description: Solid wood 5-shelf bookcase, espresso finish. 72 inches tall, 36 inches wide. Easy to disassemble for moving.

name: Electric Scooter
description: Segway Ninebot ES4 electric scooter with range extender battery. 28 mile range, 18.6 mph max speed. Barely used.

name: Vintage Record Player
description: Crosley Cruiser Deluxe turntable with Bluetooth speaker output. Plays all vinyl sizes. In perfect working order.
